title: Crops+
body:
# 🌾 CROPS+ – Premium Minecraft Farming Plugin

**Take your farming to the next level with CROPS+, the most advanced crop management system for Minecraft 1.21+.**
![Crops - Advanced Agriculture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6025a841b6d8010beb3c5ca9cd66bbb9bf067a84_0.webp)
### Main Features

 - Smart Holograms: Real-time crop info above plants, with auto-grouping and cleanup.
 - Daily Quests: 4 new quests every day with progress tracking, rewards, and midnight reset.
 - Automations: Up to 10 per player, smart field selection, automatic harvest every 60s.
 - Modern GUI: Access with /crops, intuitive menus, field teleports, and detailed stats.
 - Multi-Crop Support: Wheat, carrots, potatoes, beetroots, and sweet berries.

![Floating Holograms.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71ec87a0fec0e703befc4d65dea416e8201897a8_0.webp)
![Automation.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8558c12ad580c4482594c74fd4ad7db1936b9a95_0.webp)

### Customization & Performance
### 
CROPS+ gives you full control with a flexible configuration system, letting you adjust holograms, fields, automations, and much more to fit your server’s needs. Powerful admin commands such as /crops, /crops clearholo, and /crops config reload make managing the plugin straightforward. Built on Java 17 with asynchronous updates and a memory-efficient design, CROPS+ ensures smooth performance without straining your server.

### User Experience
### 
Players benefit from clear and smart notifications that use symbols and colors for better readability. Server owners can rely on a robust permissions system that provides complete control over access and player abilities, making the experience balanced and fair.

### Why Choose CROPS+?
### 
CROPS+ is designed to keep players engaged with rewarding daily quests while simplifying farming through powerful automation features. Its optimized performance reduces lag and ensures data stays clean, even on large servers. Easy to set up and configure, CROPS+ is both player-friendly and server-friendly, making it the ideal solution for enhancing Minecraft farming.
  
  
_Turn your farms into high-tech production hubs with CROPS+_
